description: Perform a Bayesian One-Sample T-Test on the 'Exam' variable from the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset to determine if student scores differ significantly from the national average of 50. Use a test value of 50 and a two-sided hypothesis (≠ Test value). The analysis must include descriptives, a prior and posterior plot, and a Bayes factor robustness check. Save the final analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamBayesianOneSample.jasp.
